## Problem / motivation

<!-- What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way? "As a <user>, I want ..." works well. -->

<!-- What you'd like to see happen. -->

<!-- Other approaches you thought about, and why this one. -->

## Does it earn its keep?

<!-- This repo adds moving parts only when they pay for themselves. A sentence on the trade-off
     (new service/dependency vs. simpler alternative) helps a lot — an ADR may follow. -->
